description: First multi-hit each battle grants 1 overload.
First mark each battle gains +2 or first attack applies mark 1.
First self damage each turn empowers the next attack.
Attack faces hit harder but idle turns hurt.
First finisher each battle pierces and refunds resource.
First overheat or self damage penalty becomes block loss.
First 8+ block turn grants counter pressure.
Summons absorb the first incoming hit.
First reroll each battle is protected.
Events offer a safer extra line.
Active once per battle to add a temporary drone.
Active once per battle to command a summon.
First face reward each layer can become an enchant.
Every two negative faces grant a reroll.
Active once per battle to gain 2 resource with next-turn strain.
